series_metadata.series_description: Documentation used to regulate training mandated by Dept. of Public Safety (DPS) (ORC 4749.10) or to ensure that school meets minimum training requirements as outlined in OAC 109:2-3 or to fulfill transcript requests. Documentation can include, but is not limited to opening application to conduct school, school calendar, officer/student information, testing records, test results, curriculum audit sheet and officer packet (enrollment record for each student, statement of understanding, student performance objective score sheets.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: , or documents and/or data saved electronically ; Electronic
